text.title: Cost Estimation Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observables (project_value_band, scope_frozen, historical_data_available) to apply / fall-back / skip. Each leaf references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: apply full bottom-up PERT cost estimation
rolling-baseline agile — use story-points or t-shirt, not PERT
quick-estimate template (single-point ok); overhead exceeds value

text.example: project_value_USD=85k → scope_frozen=true → apply full bottom-up PERT (rule wbs-decomposition).
